name: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor (Eclipse perf)
post_apply_message:
Eclipse perf mod applied (or will be, once staged). Recommended Steam Deck settings: 1280x800, FSR Quality, shadows off, no ray tracing (kills performance). Use the SDWEAK launcher.

Eclipse's tested Deck hardware setup: GE-Proton (10-15 or newer), TDP 18, GPU clock 1800, CPU/GPU undervolt -50 in BIOS, SDWEAK enabled. IMPORTANT: this mod targets a SPECIFIC game build (Patch 9 / build 15643690). If Steam updates the game past that, the modded exe may crash — Revert this recipe (restores the original exe from .gfm-orig) and wait for an updated mod. The mod is NOT in git (it contains a modified copyrighted game exe); stage it into your local-payloads folder first — see notes.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-optimisation mod. Mod files are NOT committed (modified copyrighted game exe + large paks) — they live in your local-payloads folder off git. To stage: extract the Eclipse .rar, then copy the CONTENTS of its inner 'STAR WARS Jedi Survivor' folder into <local-payloads>/eclipse-jedi-survivor/payload/mod/ so you end up with payload/mod/SwGame/Binaries/Win64/JediSurvivor.exe. Then Apply copies that over the game dir, backing up replaced files. Source: Eclipse on Nexus (starwarsjedisurvivor/mods/465).
